name: golden oracle: all three multicloud handoff goldens are committed and platform-tagged aws, gcp, and azure
command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const base=process.argv[1];const want={aws:"aws-handoff.json",gcp:"gcp-handoff.json",azure:"azure-handoff.json"};let ok=true;for(const[p,f]of Object.entries(want)){const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(base+"/"+f,"utf8"));const plat=j.platform||(j.handoff&&j.handoff.target_platform);if(plat!==p)ok=false;}process.exit(ok?0:1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/multicloud" && echo multicloud-handoff-goldens 1>&2
